title: Hybrid Spectrum, Dusk-to-Dawn Fly Zapper Electric Fly Catcher Fruit Flies Trap Outdoor & Indoor for Home Use Mosquito Killer Bug Zapper Insect Lamp with Light Sensor - UK Plug
bullet_points: Hybrid Spectrum: 15W hybrid regular UV and black UV dual bulbs emit a broader light spectrum, which is more effective in attracting a variety of pests, including flies, fruit flies, mosquitoes, gnats, and moths, etc.

Dusk-to-Dawn Mode: The fly zapper features a waterproof switch that offers 3 modes: ON, OFF, and AUTO mode. In the AUTO mode, the fly zapper will autonomously switch on and off based on the light changes, allowing it to operate at dusk and automatically turn off at dawn without requiring manual control.

Outdoor & Indoor Use: Outside or inside, the IP 23 waterproof rating makes the bug zapper perfect for any setting, whether it's your patio, lawn, backyard, balcony, garden, porch, kitchen, bedroom or warehouse, etc.. Covers up to 1/2 acre outdoors.

Easy to Use: The bug zapper comes with a 5ft long cord to power the 220V/50Hz AC and a removable tray for easy cleaning. Crafted with high quality ABS, the bug zapper's shell provides a secure barrier against accidental contact.

Natural Solution: The bug zapper is designed to use wild light spectrum to attract bugs. The bug zapper uses a transformer to generate 4200V voltage to charge the inner metal grid, electrocuting the pests when touched. No chemical sprays or foggers are used.
